summary: Validated Sichuan Baosheng executive and business-admin concrete first-batch page/action chains on sc_odoo. Both roles are runtime-usable; executive has no platform leakage, and the only residual is business-admin display semantics still showing owner.

notes: Executive first-batch concrete flow acceptance is aligned and has zero platform leakage.
Business-admin first-batch concrete flow acceptance is aligned through runtime business_full authority.
The remaining gap is semantic only: admin still displays sc_role_profile=owner.

next_step: Open a narrow governance batch to align business-admin display semantics with runtime authority.
